properties.description: Master pipeline v5 — extends v4 with Gold layer. Bronze (ForEach parallel) → Silver (Databricks notebook) → Gold (Databricks notebook). Adding a new entity = add one row to pipeline_metadata_config.json, zero pipeline changes.

p_load_type.description: full or incremental — passed to Bronze child pipelines, Silver pipeline, and Gold pipeline

activities.name: act_read_metadata
activities.description: Lookup Activity — reads pipeline_metadata_config.json from Bronze ADLS. Returns the full JSON array of entity configs. firstRowOnly is false so all rows are returned in output.value array.

activities.name: act_foreach_entity
activities.description: Iterate over every enabled entity in the metadata config. isSequential is false — all entities run in parallel (max 20 concurrent). Each iteration calls pl_bronze_api_ingest_v4 with entity-specific parameters.

activities.name: act_ingest_entity
activities.description: Execute Bronze child pipeline for this entity. Passes entity_name, api_path, page_size, and load_type from metadata config and master pipeline parameter.

activities.name: act_invoke_silver_pipeline
activities.description: Execute Silver transformation pipeline after all Bronze entities finish. Invokes pl_silver_api_transform_v4 which calls Databricks notebook 04_silver_all_entities_job_params_v4. Passes load_type and today ingestion_date. Only runs if ForEach succeeded.

activities.name: act_invoke_gold_pipeline
activities.description: Execute Gold transformation pipeline after Silver completes. Invokes pl_gold_api_transform_v4 which calls Databricks notebook 04_gold_full_incremental_v3. Passes load_type. Only runs if Silver succeeded — if Silver fails, Gold is automatically skipped.
